content.text:
Olá! Vejo que você mencionou "Warmup" - parece que está iniciando uma sessão de trabalho.

Deixe-me seguir o protocolo do Harness e verificar o estado atual do projeto:

<function_calls>
<invoke name="Read">
<parameter name="file_path">/Users/anotonio.silva/antonio/HQ/harness/claude-progress.txt</parameter>
</invoke>
</function_calls>
<thinking>
The user said "Warmup" which seems like they're starting a session. According to the Harness protocol, I should:

1. READ ./harness/claude-progress.txt (understand current state)
2. READ ./harness/features.json (find next feature)

Let me start by reading the progress file.
</thinking>

<function_calls>
<invoke name="Read">
<parameter name="file_path">/Users/anotonio.silva/antonio/HQ/.harness/progress.txt</parameter>
</invoke>
</function_calls>
<thinking>
Let me try different paths - the documentation mentions both `./harness/` and `.harness/` paths.
</thinking>

<function_calls>
<invoke name="Bash">
<parameter name="command">find /Users/anotonio.silva/antonio/HQ -name "*.txt" -path "*harness*" 2>/dev/null</parameter>
</invoke>
</function_calls>
<thinking>
Let me check what exists in the project structure
</thinking>

<function_calls>
<invoke name="Bash">
<parameter name="command">ls -la /Users/anotonio.silva/antonio/HQ/</parameter>
</invoke>
</function_calls>
<thinking>
I see there's a `harness/` directory. Let me check its contents.
</thinking>

<function_calls>
<invoke name="Bash">
<parameter name="command">ls -la /Users/anotonio.silva/antonio/HQ/harness/</parameter>
</invoke>
</function_calls>
<thinking>
I see there's an init.sh file but no claude-progress.txt yet. Let me check what's in features.json
</thinking>

<function_calls>
<invoke name="Read">
<parameter name="file_path">/Users/anotonio.silva/antonio/HQ/harness/features.json</parameter>
</invoke>
</function_calls>
<thinking>
This is the first session for this project - there's no progress file yet (claude-progress.txt doesn't exist) and the features.json shows all features with `passes: false`.

Let me also check the init.sh and understand the current state of the codebase.
</thinking>

<function_calls>
<invoke name="Read">
<parameter name="file_path">/Users/anotonio.silva/antonio/HQ/harness/init.sh</parameter>
</invoke>
</function_calls>
<thinking>
Now let me check what's the current status of the project - what files exist, the git status, etc.
</thinking>

<function_calls>
<invoke name="Bash">
<parameter name="command">cd /Users/anotonio.silva/antonio/HQ && date && git status</parameter>
</invoke>
</function_calls>
<thinking>
Good - now I have a clear picture:

1. **Date**: January 2, 2026
2. **Project state**: Early development - has `harness/features.json` with all features at `passes: false`
3. **No progress file exists yet** - this is essentially session 0 or 1

Let me check the docs/HQ_SPEC.md since it was modified, and also understand the project structure better.
</thinking>

<function_calls>
<invoke name="Read">
<parameter name="file_path">/Users/anotonio.silva/antonio/HQ/docs/HQ_SPEC.md</parameter>
</invoke>
</function_calls>
<thinking>
Excellent! Now I have a complete understanding of the project. Let me summarize the current state for the user.
</thinking>

Perfeito! Aqui está o resumo do estado atual do projeto **HQ**:

---

## Estado Atual

**Data:** 2 de Janeiro de 2026  
**Branch:** `main`  
**Status Git:** `docs/HQ_SPEC.md` modificado (não commitado)

---

## Resumo do Projeto

**HQ** é uma aplicação desktop nativa para gerenciar sessões de desenvolvimento de agentes AI. Stack:
- **Tauri 2.x** (Rust backend)
- **React 19** (frontend)
- **PatternFly 6** (UI components)
- **@zazcart/tools** (state management)

---

## Features (todas com `passes: false`)

| ID | Feature | Prioridade |
|----|---------|------------|
| 1 | Tauri + React bootstrap | P0 |
| 2 | Project Scanner (detectar projetos com `.claude/`) | P0 |
| 3 | PTY spawn/kill com portable-pty | P0 |
| 4 | UI Shell (sidebar + tabs + content) | P0 |
| 5 | Markdown log viewer | P1 |
| 6 | Chat UI para agentes | P1 |
| 7 | File system watcher | P1 |
| 8 | Settings persistence | P2 |

---

## Próximo Passo Sugerido

Iniciar pela **Feature 1: Tauri + React bootstrap** - a fundação do projeto.

Precisa que eu crie um plano de implementação para alguma feature específica?
